headline.title: SpaceX创纪录IPO，马斯克成为全球首位万亿富翁
headline.summary: 太空探索公司SpaceX于6月12日上市，募资750亿美元，市值约2.2万亿美元，创下史上最大IPO纪录。其创始人埃隆·马斯克身价随之突破1.11万亿美元，成为全球首位万亿富翁。上市首日股价上涨19%，点燃太空产业投资热情。
headline.title_en: SpaceX's Record-Breaking IPO Makes Elon Musk World's First Trillionaire
headline.summary_en: SpaceX went public on June 12, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO in history, ending its first day with a market cap of about $2.2 trillion. Founder Elon Musk's net worth topped $1.11 trillion, making him the world's first trillionaire. The stock rose 19% on debut, fueling a surge in space industry investment.
headline.reason: SpaceX的IPO跨越财经理财、国际事务和AI科技三大领域，创下多项历史纪录，对全球经济、太空产业和科技创新具有里程碑意义。
headline.reason_en: SpaceX's IPO spans finance, world affairs, and AI/technology, setting multiple records and marking a milestone for the global economy, space industry, and tech innovation.
